title: AGF QA ticket
description: S093 QA-INTAKE-SCHEMA. A bug / regression / doc / ux ticket filed by the QA-agent terminal while reviewing a merged PR. Lives under backlog/qa-tickets/*.qa-ticket.json. Promoted into sprint stories by scripts/backlog/promote-qa.mjs.

agfFormatVersion.description: Schema version. Bump on a breaking change.

id.description: Stable ticket id. Pattern: QA-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN. NNN is the next free three-digit slot for that date — auto-assigned by scripts/backlog/qa-ticket.mjs.

title.description: One-line ticket title. Mirrors the future story title when promoted.

filedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the ticket was created.

foundInPr.description: GitHub PR number where QA observed the bug. Optional — set when known.

foundInSprint.description: Sprint id under review when the bug was filed. Optional — useful when the PR isn't merged yet.

severity.description: critical = build is broken / unplayable; major = core feature regression; minor = edge-case glitch; polish = cosmetic only.

type.description: bug = fix needed; regression-needed = old-functionality bug that also warrants an automated regression test (requires regressionFor); doc = missing/wrong documentation or acceptance line; ux = friction without a strict behaviour bug.

summary.description: Free-form context. Embedded into the promoted story's summary.

repro.description: Ordered repro steps in user-facing language. Required so anyone (human or other agent) can re-walk the bug.

logs.description: Optional console / diagnostics excerpt — quote sparingly, link to a file under notes/qa/ for long captures.

screenshot.description: Repo-relative path to a screenshot under notes/qa/. Optional.

playtest.description: Repo-relative path to a draft .playtest.json under examples/<project>/playtests/qa-proposed/ that reproduces the bug. Strongly preferred for regression-needed tickets.

regressionFor.description: When type='regression-needed', the bug ticket id this regression test would cover.

epicHint.description: Optional epic id to nudge promotion into a specific epic. Promote script honours it; otherwise the story inherits the sprint's default epic.
